description: A bad model promotion cannot be reverted quickly because the prior version was unloaded and untested for rollback.
body: Failure mode: a newly promoted model regresses in production, but the previous version was unloaded and the rollback procedure was never tested, so recovery requires a slow rebuild while users suffer. Detection signals: a serving config with no warm prior version and no rehearsed rollback drill, plus an incident timeline dominated by recovery rather than detection. Do not improvise a rollback during the incident by rebuilding from scratch. Safer fallback: keep the last-good version warm and registered, rehearse a one-switch rollback as a drill, and treat any deployment lacking a tested rollback as blocked until the path is verified.
